name: stage2-rvv-composite-gather-macc-scatter-prerealized-realization
title: Stage2 RVV composite gather-MAcc-scatter pre-realized realization owner
description: Implemented the bounded RVV plugin-local selected-body realization owner that fuses pre-realized runtime-scalar computed-mask indexed gather, MAcc, and scatter family bodies into the explicit composite route-supported tcrv_rvv body.
creator: codex
notes: Pre-realized runtime-scalar computed-mask indexed gather/MAcc/scatter family bodies now reach the explicit composite route-supported contract through an RVV plugin-local realization owner. The owner validates shared compare, mask, index, output, config, policy, ABI, and AVL/VL facts, removes family-only placeholder ABI values, and fails closed on stale index binding. Artifact/export evidence remains the next continuation point.
